# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: example-gateway
  namespace: default
  labels:
    istio: ingressgateway # required by Istio ingress gateway to load envoy config
spec:
  hosts:
    - 192.168.50.77 # IP or DNS address of the host
    - gateway-example-gateway-a.default.svc.cluster.local # Name of a service in Istio namespace
    - 192.168.3.1 # IP or DNS address of the host that should be used for proxying
  ports:
    - number: 400
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
